profile.name: Ramadan Shemsu Hussen
bio: My name is Ramadan Shemsu Hussen. I am a Computer Engineering student at Hacettepe University passionate about AI research, computer vision, and building solutions that create impact.
profile.quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
profile.currentWork: Currently working on computer vision systems for renewable energy and exploring the intersections of AI, cinema, and literature.

contact.intro: If you'd like to reach out for collaborations, inquiries, or just to say hello, feel free to contact me through the following channels.

books.title: Gençlerle Başbaşa
books.author: Prof. Dr. Ali Fuad Başgil
books.notes: Yine yazarının deyişiyle: "Geleceğin ümidi olan gençleri, bunalımdan, iradesiz ve cesaretsiz yaşamaktan kurtaracak olan bu kitap; başarılı olmanın sırlarını göstermektedir."
